title: The Simple Path to Wealth
subtitle: Your Road Map to Financial Independence and a Rich, Free Life
author: James Linton Collins
themes: Spend less than you earn and invest the surplus
Index funds outperform active management over time
F-You Money as the ultimate form of freedom
The stock market always goes up over long periods
Financial independence gives you control over your time
awards: Instant New York Times Bestseller (2025 Revised Edition)
Called 'the Godfather of FI' in the FIRE community
Most-recommended FIRE investing book on the internet
excerpt: Spend less than you earn, invest the surplus, and avoid debt. That is the simple path to wealth. Complex investment strategies exist to make money for advisors, not investors. One index fund, held forever, beats 80% of professionally managed portfolios.
